assertions.expectation: Explains that Extended channel provides up to 24 months of support vs 14 months for standard channels
assertions.reason: Response clearly states '24-month support instead of 14 months' and mentions versions 1.27+ get this extended support

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended channel has additional cost (it's not free)
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions 'Additional cost during extended support period (months 15-24)' and 'no extra charge during standard support'

assertions.expectation: Notes that Extended channel gets the same versions as Regular but keeps them available longer
assertions.reason: Response states 'Same cadence as Regular during standard support' and explains that versions remain available longer through extended support

assertions.expectation: Warns that staying on older versions longer means missing new features and accumulating technical debt
assertions.reason: While the response discusses operational considerations and tradeoffs, it does not explicitly warn about missing new features or accumulating technical debt from staying on older versions

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel to Extended
assertions.reason: Response provides the exact command: 'gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --zone ZONE --release-channel extended'

assertions.expectation: Advises checking that the current version (1.31) is available on Extended before switching
assertions.reason: Response includes a specific warning about 1.31 availability and provides a command to check available versions in Extended channel

assertions.expectation: Recommends Extended for environments with compliance requirements or slow internal change processes
assertions.reason: Response recommends Extended channel for customers who 'Need true 24-month support for compliance/stability' and have slow change processes

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended doesn't mean you can skip upgrades forever — you still must upgrade within 24 months
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'EoS enforcement delayed - happens at 24 months instead of 14 months' and includes planning for upgrades before 24-month EoS

assertions.expectation: Notes that minor version upgrades on Extended are NOT automated (except at EoS) — customers must plan and initiate them manually
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'Manual minor upgrade responsibility' and 'Minor upgrades become manual' during extended support period, with commands showing manual upgrade process
